Our Story

About Us

The Beginning

A Passion for Perfection

Aurora Dining was born from a vision to create a sanctuary where culinary artistry and elegant ambiance converge. Founded in 2015 by Chef Marcus Laurent, Aurora has grown from a bold dream into one of New York's most celebrated dining destinations.

Every detail — from the hand-selected ingredients to the carefully curated atmosphere — is designed to transport our guests into a world of refined taste and timeless beauty.

Executive Chef

Marcus Laurent

Trained in the grand kitchens of Paris and Tokyo, Chef Marcus brings a unique fusion of classical European technique and Asian innovation to every plate.

His philosophy is simple yet profound: let the ingredients speak, enhance — never overpower — and create moments of genuine joy through food.

Our Space

Interior Gallery

Our Philosophy

Guiding Principles

Excellence

Uncompromising quality in every element of the dining experience.

Sustainability

Responsibly sourced ingredients from local farms and artisan producers.

Passion

A deep love for the craft that shines through in every dish we create.

Our Journey

Milestones

2015

The Beginning

Aurora Dining opens its doors in the heart of Manhattan.

2017

First Michelin Star

Recognized for culinary excellence by the Michelin Guide.

2019

Second Michelin Star

Elevated to two-star status for exceptional cuisine.

2021

Wine Spectator Award

Honored with the Grand Award for our wine program.

2023

Third Michelin Star

Achieved the prestigious three-star Michelin rating.

2025

Global Expansion

Aurora Tokyo and Aurora London debut to critical acclaim.

Aurora

Dining

A culinary journey where artistry meets flavor in every dish we create.
